subcodes.title: Words to Myron Phelps and Madame Canavarro in Dec. 1902
subcodes.first_line: This narrative cannot be literally true, as the earth is round and not to be surveyed from any mountain. The meaning is this: Man has two natures
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @two aspects of the human soul; the higher and lower natures, @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
